reason: This finding addresses setting the minimum password age for existing user accounts to 1 day, aligning with standard STIG password policy hardening. The remediation script uses the chage command to target only non-compliant accounts based on /etc/shadow, posing minimal risk of lockout or service disruption. It follows a common hardening pattern for authentication and authorization without affecting SSH/console access or critical services.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Low risk of user inconvenience due to restricted password change frequency, but no system breakage or access loss
